case_title: CCSF DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES VS MUNIZ, RONALD P.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT MAILED TO DEFT.
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 769498 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MUNIZ, RONALD P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNIZ, RONALD P. $1,141.25 PRINCIPAL, $1,066.21 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,207.46, RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT OF CASE NO. 769498. JUDGEMENT ENTERED ON JANUARY 7, 1998. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
